summary: Frontend-only sweep for the new Brands section, partnership badges, FAB, TrustedBrands, GA tag, sitemap, and regression. Most critical flows pass. ONE HIGH-priority bug: the Floating Smart Deals button never appears on any public page because /api/deals/active returns 404 and FloatingDealsButton hides itself when activeCount === 0. Sitemap, GA tag, brand pages, partnership badges, breadcrumbs, mobile nav, solutions->brands linking, and legacy /deals all verified.

critical.issue: Returns 404 on the public preview environment. This is the data source for the Floating Smart Deals button counter. Result: FAB is permanently hidden across the site. (Backend testing was out of scope for this run, flagged here because it directly breaks a frontend requirement.)

ui_bugs.issue: Never renders on any public page. Two compounding causes: (a) /api/deals/active 404 -> catch sets activeCount=0; (b) component logic isHidden = ... || activeCount === 0 hides it whenever there are zero active deals. Requirement says FAB must be visible on every public page (Home, /brands, /brands/:slug, mobile etc). Recommend rendering the FAB independent of the deal count (use the count only for the badge bubble) AND fixing the 404 to return [].

integration_issues.issue: Axios call to ${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api/deals/active fails with 404 on every public page navigation, polluting the console with errors and silently disabling the FAB.

issues: meta name="robots" tag is not present in <head>. Requirement asked for explicit 'index,follow'. Browsers default to index,follow when absent so this is non-blocking, but the SEO component should still emit it as specified.

verified_features.smoke_all_pages_load: PASS - Home, About, /brands, /brands/{roomz,morbit,jabra,poly,neat,yealink,logitech} all load with no JS pageerrors. Only console errors observed are the /api/deals/active 404s (see above).
verified_features.top_nav_desktop: PASS - Home, Solutions, Brands, About, Blog, Contact present. /brands link routes correctly. Smart Deals NOT in nav. 'Book Free Consultation' CTA present.
verified_features.mobile_nav_390x844: PASS - Hamburger opens, /brands link present in mobile menu.
verified_features.brands_hub: PASS - One H1 ('A trusted brand ecosystem, engineered around your outcomes.'). Featured Partners section shows ROOMZ + Morbit (brand-featured-roomz / brand-featured-morbit). Other 5 brands rendered as brand-card-{jabra,poly,neat,yealink,logitech}. Breadcrumb element present.
verified_features.partnership_badges: PASS - ROOMZ shows 'distribution partner' (amber filled) on hub featured card, hero (brand-partnership-badge) and at-a-glance (brand-partnership-badge-glance). All 6 other brands show 'channel partner' on hub cards, hero and at-a-glance. About page detailed cards show correct 'distribution'/'channel' partnership badges for all 7.
verified_features.brand_detail_structure: PASS - Each /brands/:slug page has exactly one <h1>, hero partnership badge, at-a-glance panel with partnership/category/ideal-for/proof-points, strengths grid, products grid, use cases, fidelis delivery wrap with related-solutions chips, other-brands grid, footer CTA.
verified_features.solutions_to_brands_linking: PASS - /solutions/workspace-experience -> roomz+morbit, /solutions/meeting-rooms -> poly+neat+logitech+yealink, /solutions/headsets -> jabra+poly+logitech. All anchors point to /brands/<slug>.
verified_features.trusted_brands_home: PASS - Section renders with testIdPrefix='home-trusted-brands'. All 7 brand logos present each with partnership pill (Distribution for ROOMZ, Channel for the rest). 'Explore the full brand ecosystem' CTA (home-trusted-brands-cta) routes to /brands.
verified_features.trusted_brands_about_detailed: PASS - testIdPrefix='about-brand-ecosystem'. All 7 detailed cards rendered with detailed-partnership badges (about-brand-ecosystem-detailed-partnership-{slug}). H2 'Meet the brands behind our deliveries.' present.
verified_features.google_analytics: PASS - On Home: window.dataLayer is array (length>0), window.gtag is function, <script src='*googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-EEXXM8VHSC'> present in DOM. (GA tag is in index.html so the same applies to /brands and /brands/roomz.)
verified_features.sitemap: PASS - GET /api/sitemap.xml returns 200 and includes /brands plus all 7 /brands/<slug> URLs (verified via curl).
verified_features.seo_titles: PASS - Each /brands/:slug page sets a unique <title> matching the pattern '<Brand> UAE Partner | <Tagline> - Fidelis Logic | Fidelis Logic'.
verified_features.regression_legacy_deals: PASS - /deals still loads (renders Smart Deals page with 'No deals found in this category' empty state).
verified_features.regression_other_pages: PASS - Home, About, Solutions/*, Blog, Contact all render with no JS errors (console only logs the unrelated /api/deals/active 404).

action_items: FIX FAB VISIBILITY (HIGH): In /app/frontend/src/components/FloatingDealsButton.jsx remove the `|| activeCount === 0` clause from isHidden so the button renders even when there are zero active deals. Keep the count badge conditional on activeCount > 0.

FIX BACKEND 404 (HIGH): Backend route /api/deals/active is missing/broken on the preview environment. It should return an empty array [] (200) instead of 404 when no active deals exist. (Note: backend testing was explicitly out of scope for this run, but this 404 directly breaks the frontend requirement that FAB be visible.)
ADD ROBOTS META (LOW): Make the SEO component emit <meta name="robots" content="index,follow"> on /brands and /brands/:slug pages as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: FloatingDealsButton.jsx couples visibility to data availability — UI element should render based on route/state, not API response. As-is, any backend hiccup silently kills a primary CTA.
FloatingDealsButton uses bare `catch {}` swallowing the 404 with no telemetry; consider a console.warn for observability.
PartnershipBadge.jsx is clean and well documented; uppercase tracking + amber dot pattern is consistent across hub, featured, hero, glance and detailed variants.
TrustedBrands.jsx supports both compact and detailed variants cleanly via testIdPrefix prop — good pattern for re-use across Home and About.
brands.js is a single 540-line data file — fine for now but watch for growth; consider splitting per-brand if it crosses ~700 lines.

success_rate.backend: n/a (skipped per request, only sitemap + 1 endpoint touched)
success_rate.frontend: ~93% (1 HIGH bug: FAB invisible; 1 LOW: missing robots meta)

test_credentials: n/a - all tested pages are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brands feature, partnership badges (Distribution Partner / Channel Partner), TrustedBrands on Home (testid prefix 'home-trusted-brands') + About detailed variant (prefix 'about-brand-ecosystem'), GA tag (G-EEXXM8VHSC), sitemap, breadcrumbs, mobile nav, solutions->brands linking, brand detail page structure -- all verified working. The remaining issue to retest after main agent fix is the Floating Smart Deals button visibility ([data-testid='floating-deals-button']) and the /api/deals/active backend endpoint. When testing FAB next time, verify: (1) it renders on Home, /brands, /brands/roomz, mobile (390x844); (2) clicking it routes to /deals; (3) it does NOT render on /admin* or on /deals itself (per current component logic).
rca_of_the_issue: FAB invisible RCA: FloatingDealsButton.jsx fetches /api/deals/active on mount; that endpoint currently 404s on the preview env, so axios catch sets activeCount=0. Then the component evaluates `isHidden = dismissed || path.startsWith('/admin') || path.startsWith('/deals') || activeCount === 0`, returns null, and nothing renders. Two-part fix: (a) remove the activeCount===0 clause so the FAB shows regardless; (b) ensure backend returns 200 [] for empty deals to keep the count badge accurate.
